creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kenyon,

I just wanted to reply to your message about ports/169307.

You are right that the rsyslog6-current version is 6.3.6, but the 6.3
branch is the beta version and the 6.2 branch is the stable version.

See: http://www.rsyslog.com/download/


Regards,
Brad Davis
